data.name: ArtifactUploadOptionsRequireUploadArtifacts
data.value: '--report-azdo-upload-artifact-include', '--report-azdo-upload-artifact-exclude', and '--report-azdo-upload-artifact-name' require '--report-azdo-upload-artifacts' to be set to a value other than 'off'.

data.name: ArtifactUploadRequiresTfBuildWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps artifact upload was requested, but TF_BUILD is not set to 'true'; skipping Azure DevOps artifact upload and build tags.

data.name: AzureDevOpsDemoteKnownFlakyRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-demote-known-flaky' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsDemoteKnownFlakyRequiresFlakyHistory
data.value: '--report-azdo-demote-known-flaky' requires '--report-azdo-flaky-history' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsFlakyHistoryRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-flaky-history' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingCompleteRunFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to complete the test run.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingCreateRunFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to create the test run.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingFailedToDeleteCoordinationFile
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to delete coordination file

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingFinalizeWaitTimedOut
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing timed out after {0} waiting for {1} participant file(s); finalizing the run anyway.
data.comment: {0} is the finalize wait timeout. {1} is the number of participant files still pending.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingHttpError
data.value: Azure DevOps REST API request failed with status code {0}. Response: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the HTTP status code. {1} is the response body. {Locked="REST API"}

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingInvalidResponse
data.value: Azure DevOps REST API returned an unexpected response payload.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingMissingConfiguration
data.value: '--publish-azdo-test-results' was set, but Azure DevOps live publishing is disabled because the following environment variables are missing or invalid: {0}.
data.comment: {0} is the comma-separated list of missing or invalid environment variables. {Locked="--publish-azdo-test-results"}{Locked="TF_BUILD=true"}{Locked="SYSTEM_TEAMPROJECT"}{Locked="SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN"}{Locked="BUILD_BUILDID"}

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingMissingRunIdFile
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing could not locate azdo-runid.<buildId>.json for the shared run.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingPublishResultsFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to publish test results.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingRequestFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps REST API request failed after all retries.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingResultAttachmentFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to upload a test result attachment.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingResultIdParseFailedWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing accepted a batch of test results but could not parse the assigned result IDs; result-level attachments for this batch will be skipped.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingRunAttachmentFailed
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing failed to upload a test run attachment.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingRunIdFileMismatch
data.value: Azure DevOps live publishing found an azdo-runid.<buildId>.json file for a different Azure DevOps project.

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingTimeoutErrorMessage
data.value: Timeout

data.name: AzureDevOpsLivePublishingTimeoutErrorMessageWithReason
data.value: Timeout: {0}

data.name: AzureDevOpsQuarantineFileRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-quarantine-file' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsReportSeverityRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-severity' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsStackFrameFilterRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-stackframe-filter' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: AzureDevOpsSummaryRequiresAzureDevOps
data.value: '--report-azdo-summary' requires '--report-azdo' to be enabled

data.name: DemoteKnownFlakyOptionDescription
data.value: Demote failures with an Azure DevOps flaky history of at least {0}% in the selected window to warnings.

data.name: Description
data.value: Azure DevOps report generator to write errors to the output in a way that Azure DevOps understands.

data.name: DisplayName
data.value: Azure DevOps report generator

data.name: FlakyHistoryFailureAnnotation
data.value: [flaky: failed {0}/{1} in last {2}d]
data.comment: {0} is the failure count. {1} is the total run count. {2} is the history window in days. {Locked="[flaky: failed {0}/{1} in last {2}d]"}

data.name: FlakyHistoryLoadFailedWarning
data.value: Unable to load Azure DevOps flaky history. Continuing without history annotations. {0}

data.name: FlakyHistoryLoadTimedOutInfo
data.value: Azure DevOps flaky history did not finish loading within {0} seconds. Continuing without history annotations.

data.name: FlakyHistoryMissingEnvironmentWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps flaky history was requested but the required Azure DevOps environment variables are missing. Continuing without history annotations.

data.name: FlakyHistoryOptionDescription
data.value: Query Azure DevOps test result history for the past N days (1-90) and annotate reported failures with flakiness context.

data.name: FlakyHistoryRegressionAnnotation
data.value: [REGRESSION]

data.name: FlakyHistoryRunsCappedInfo
data.value: Azure DevOps flaky history returned {0} runs. Only the first {1} runs will be inspected.
data.comment: {0} is the number of runs returned. {1} is the maximum number of runs to inspect.

data.name: FlakyHistoryResultsPagingStoppedWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps flaky history for run '{0}' exceeded {1} pages or returned an unchanged continuation token. Remaining results will be ignored.
data.comment: {0} is the Azure DevOps run URL. {1} is the maximum number of pages.

data.name: InvalidArtifactUploadGlob
data.value: Invalid glob pattern {0}.

data.name: InvalidArtifactUploadMode
data.value: Invalid artifact upload mode {0}.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid artifact upload mode.

data.name: InvalidFlakyHistoryDays
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for '--report-azdo-flaky-history'. Provide an integer between 1 and 90.

data.name: InvalidSeverity
data.value: Invalid option {0}.

data.name: InvalidStackFrameFilterRegex
data.value: Invalid '--report-azdo-stackframe-filter' regex '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the regex pattern. {1} is the validation error message. {Locked="--report-azdo-stackframe-filter"}

data.name: NoFailureMessageFallback
data.value: Test failed without an additional message.

data.name: OptionDescription
data.value: Enable Azure DevOps report generator to write errors to the output in a way that Azure DevOps understands.

data.name: PublishAzdoRunNameOptionDescription
data.value: Custom Azure DevOps test run name for live test-result publishing.

data.name: PublishAzdoRunNameRequiresPublishAzdoTestResults
data.value: '--publish-azdo-run-name' requires '--publish-azdo-test-results' to be enabled

data.name: PublishAzdoTestResultsOptionDescription
data.value: Publish test results live to the Azure DevOps Tests tab.

data.name: QuarantinedAnnotation
data.value: [quarantined]

data.name: QuarantineFileLoadFailedWarning
data.value: Unable to load Azure DevOps quarantine file '{0}'. Continuing without quarantine awareness. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the quarantine file path. {1} is the exception message. {Locked="--report-azdo-quarantine-file"}

data.name: QuarantineFileMissingWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps quarantine file '{0}' does not exist. Continuing without quarantine awareness.

data.name: QuarantineFileOptionDescription
data.value: Path to a text file that lists quarantined test fully qualified names or glob patterns. Matching failures are reported as warnings.

data.name: QuarantinePatternTooLongWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps quarantine pattern exceeds the {0} character limit and will be ignored.

data.name: QuarantinePatternsCappedWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps quarantine file contains more than {0} patterns. Remaining patterns will be ignored.

data.name: SeverityOptionDescription
data.value: Severity to use for the reported event. Options are: error (default) and warning.

data.name: StackFrameFilterOptionDescription
data.value: Additional regex patterns (matched against the fully-qualified type prefix of each stack frame) that should be skipped when looking for the user's call site to annotate. Repeatable; up to {0} patterns. Compiled with a {1}ms match timeout. Additive to the extension's built-in MSTest assertion-implementation prefixes.
data.comment: {0} is the maximum allowed pattern count. {1} is the per-match timeout in milliseconds. {Locked="MSTest"}

data.name: StackFrameFilterTooManyRegexes
data.value: '--report-azdo-stackframe-filter' accepts at most {0} patterns.

data.name: SummaryOptionDescription
data.value: Write a Markdown job summary at the end of the test run and upload it via '##vso[task.uploadsummary]'. An optional file path argument overrides the default location ('{testResultsDir}/azdo-summary-{tfm}.md'). Requires '--report-azdo'.

data.name: SummaryRequiresTfBuildWarning
data.value: Azure DevOps job summary was requested, but TF_BUILD is not set to 'true'; skipping summary emission.

data.name: SummaryWriteFailedWarning
data.value: Failed to write Azure DevOps summary file '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the summary file path. {1} is the error message.

data.name: UploadArtifactExcludeOptionDescription
data.value: Exclude files from Azure DevOps artifact upload using glob patterns relative to the test results directory.

data.name: UploadArtifactIncludeOptionDescription
data.value: Include files in Azure DevOps artifact upload using glob patterns relative to the test results directory. Defaults to '**/*'.

data.name: UploadArtifactNameOptionDescription
data.value: Override the Azure DevOps artifact container name. Defaults to 'TestResults_{assemblyName}_{tfm}'.

data.name: UploadArtifactsOptionDescription
data.value: Upload test result files and/or add build tags to Azure DevOps. Options are: off (default), tags-only, files, and all.
